paragraph: Trans Athletes Are Destroying Women’s Sports: It’s Time to Draw the Line. Unless we stand up and say “enough,” future generations of girls won’t have the chance to compete on a level playing field. Add your name to the petition to save women's sports.The post Trans Athletes Are Destroying Women’s Sports: It’s Time to Draw the Line appeared first on Breitbart. Published by breitbart on 2025-04-18 14:14:07. Read more: https://www.breitbart.com/politics/2025/04/18/trans-athletes-are-destroying-womens-sports-its-time-to-draw-the-line/
title: Trans Athletes Are Destroying Women’s Sports: It’s Time to Draw the Line
